introSection: Diamond Mine Run is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Magic Springs & Crystal Falls in Hot Springs, Arkansas, USA. It was built by E&F Miler Industries and opened in 2000.
fullText:
Diamond Mine Run is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Magic Springs & Crystal Falls in Hot Springs, Arkansas, USA. It was built by E&F Miler Industries and opened in 2000.



Bordeaux red track and supports
